issues.title: Autofix pill not appearing on stashed agent pane after PS failure
issues.suggested_reply:
Thanks for the report! To help us narrow this down, could you share:

1. The contents of `%LocalAppData%\Packages\<pfn>\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\<pkgver>\wta-main_helper-*.log` around the time of the failure.
2. The exit code captured by your `OSC 133;D` mark (you can check with `$LASTEXITCODE` immediately after the failing command).
3. Whether the helper session had reached `Connected` state when the failure occurred — autofix early-returns if the session is still cold-starting.

More detail on the helper lifecycle here: https://github.com/microsoft/intelligent-terminal/blob/main/doc/specs/Multi-window-agent-pane.md

issues.title: Custom agent dropdown in Settings shows blank label
issues.suggested_reply: Looks like the `custom:` prefix is being trimmed during render. We resolve the friendly label via the `Effective*` policy gate (see `GlobalAppSettings.cpp:560-570`). Could you share your `settings.json` (redact paths) so we can check the value being stored?

issues.title: copilot-pr-autopilot script throws on PS 5.1 due to ConvertFrom-Json pipeline form
issues.suggested_reply: Confirmed — PS 5.1 wraps `return $stdout | ConvertFrom-Json` as a single-element array. Fix is to use `return (ConvertFrom-Json -InputObject $stdout)` so the array unrolls. Will land in the next release.

issues.title: Agent pane fails to restore after Ctrl+Shift+/
issues.suggested_reply: Could you check `terminal-agent-pane.log` for any `RestoreStashedAgentPane` errors? The toggle is built on `Pane::HidePane`/`RestorePane` (see `Tab.cpp`), so a restore failure usually indicates the helper conpty child exited.
